sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18476" key="a)/fra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄφρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n18476.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plaster,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
